title: What is a Folder?
drDigitalIntro: A folder is a container that holds files — just like a paper folder holds documents in a filing cabinet. Folders keep related files together so your computer doesn't become one giant messy pile. Let's look inside a folder.

playgroundTask.goal: Look inside a folder and come back out

steps.say: A folder holds files, like a paper folder holds papers. Double-click the Documents folder to open it.
These are the files kept inside Documents. Double-click Resume.pdf to open one.
Now click Home in the sidebar to step back out of the folder.

drDigitalSuccess: You opened a folder, looked at a file inside, and came back out. Folders keep your files organized!
drDigitalHint: Follow the yellow glow — double-click folders and files, but single-click the Home button in the sidebar.
